    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    add(short[]) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Adds a combination to the batch by copying it into the internal buffer.
    add(short[], int, short) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Adds a combination by assembling it directly into the internal buffer from a prefix and a final element.
    add(WorkBatch) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    Offers a WorkBatch to the queue using a non-blocking, relaxed operation.
    ADJACENCY_CACHE - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    A pre-computed boolean matrix for O(1) adjacency checks between any two cells.
    ADJACENCY_MASKS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Pre-computed bitmasks representing the result of clicking each cell.
    adjacencyArray - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    A pre-computed table storing the adjacent cells for each cell as an array of indices.

    allContexts - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A thread-safe collection of all active CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext instances.
    allQueuesEmpty() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    Checks if all work queues in the system are empty.

    areAdjacent(short, short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Convenience overload for Grid.areAdjacent(short, short, ValueFormat) that assumes Grid.ValueFormat.Index for both input cells.
    areAdjacent(short, short, Grid.ValueFormat) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Determines if two cells are adjacent to each other in the grid.
    ArrayPool - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A high-performance, non-thread-safe object pool for recycling fixed-size short[] arrays.
    ArrayPool(int) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    Constructs a new ArrayPool and pre-allocates its internal array buffer.
    arrays - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    The internal buffer storing the pre-allocated short[] arrays.
    arrays - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    The array of pooled tasks, managed as a circular buffer.

    B

    BATCH_SIZE - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    The default WorkBatch.capacity for a batch.
    Bitmask - Enum constant in enum class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.ValueFormat
    A format representing the entire grid state as a bitmask.
    buffer - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    The pre-allocated circular buffer storing the short[] combinations.

    C

    cachedAdjacencyState - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A bitmask representing the set of initially true cells toggled by the current CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix.
    canAffectFirstTrueCell(short, short, Grid.ValueFormat) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Determines if a prospective click on a clickCell can affect or create a new first true cell in the grid.
    canPotentiallySatisfyConstraints(int) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Checks if the current CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix and its descendants can potentially form a valid solution.
    capacity - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    The maximum number of arrays the pool can hold.
    capacity - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    The maximum number of tasks the pool can hold.
    capacity - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    The maximum number of combinations this batch can hold.
    clear() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Resets the batch to an empty state, making it ready for reuse.
    clearBit(int) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Clears the bit at the specified index in the grid state to false.
    click(long[]) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Applies a pre-computed bitmask to the grid state.
    click(short) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Deprecated.
    As of 2025.07, replaced by Grid.click(short[]) for bulk operations. Single-click operations are no longer on the hot path.
    click(short[]) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Simulates clicks on multiple cells in the Grid.
    click(short, short) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Simulates a click on the Grid at the specified row and column.
    click(short, Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Simulates a click on the Grid at the specified cell, supporting Grid.ValueFormat.Index or Grid.ValueFormat.PackedInt formats.
    CLICK_ADJACENCY_MATRIX - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A static adjacency matrix used to initialize CombinationGeneratorTask.TRUE_CELL_ADJACENCY_MASKS.
    CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    A pre-computed lookup table mapping a cell click to its effect on the puzzle's true cells.
    clone() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this Grid instance.
    com.github.mrgarbagegamer - package com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    Provides a high-performance, brute-force solver for a hexagonal Lights Out-style puzzle.
    CombinationGeneratorTask - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A RecursiveAction that generates combinations of clicks for the Lights Out puzzle solver.
    CombinationGeneratorTask() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A protected constructor for non-root tasks, used exclusively by the TaskPool.
    CombinationGeneratorTask(int, CombinationQueueArray, short[], int) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Constructs the root task for combination generation.
    CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A container for all thread-local resources used by a generator.
    CombinationMessage - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A specialized Log4j2 Message for logging solution combinations with low overhead.
    CombinationMessage(short[], Grid.ValueFormat) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Constructs a new CombinationMessage.
    combinationQueue - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    The monkey's preferred CombinationQueue.
    CombinationQueue - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A thin, type-safe wrapper around a JCTools MpmcArrayQueue designed exclusively for transferring WorkBatch objects between producer and consumer threads.
    CombinationQueue() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    Constructs a new CombinationQueue with a fixed capacity.
    CombinationQueueArray - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A structure for managing work distribution and shared resources between generators and monkeys.
    CombinationQueueArray(int) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Constructs the shared queue array and its associated resources.
    compute() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The main computation method for the RecursiveAction.
    computeAdjacencyMaskFast(short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Computes and caches the bitmask for CombinationGeneratorTask.FIRST_TRUE_ADJACENTS.
    computeAdjacents(short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Convenience overload for Grid.computeAdjacents(short, ValueFormat) that assumes Grid.ValueFormat.Index for both input and output.
    computeAdjacents(short, Grid.ValueFormat) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Convenience overload for Grid.computeAdjacents(short, ValueFormat, ValueFormat) that assumes the input and output formats are the same.
    computeAdjacents(short, Grid.ValueFormat, Grid.ValueFormat) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Computes the hexagonally adjacent cells for a given cell, supporting flexible input and output formats.
    computeIntermediateSubtasks(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Dispatches to the appropriate intermediate subtask computation method based on the CombinationGeneratorTask.skipConstraintsCheck flag.
    computeIntermediateSubtasksConstraintPath(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Forks subtasks for an intermediate task, performing a constraint check to prune invalid branches.
    computeIntermediateSubtasksSkipPath(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Forks subtasks for an intermediate task, skipping the constraint check.
    computeLeafCombinations(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Generates the final combinations for a leaf task by iterating through all possible final clicks.
    computePackedToIndex(short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Computes the conversion from Grid.ValueFormat.PackedInt to Grid.ValueFormat.Index format.
    computeRootSubtasks(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Computes and forks the first level of subtasks from the root task.
    context - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A ThreadLocal container for the CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.
    convertTo(Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Converts the internal combination list to the specified Grid.ValueFormat.
    currentBatch - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    The WorkBatch currently being filled by this thread.

    D

    DEFAULT_NUM_CLICKS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
    The default number of clicks to test for a solution.
    DEFAULT_NUM_THREADS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
    The default number of threads to use for both generators and workers.
    DEFAULT_QUESTION_NUMBER - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
    The default puzzle to solve, corresponding to the hardest variant (Q35).
    Design and Implementation - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
     

    E

    endTime - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    The end time of the program's operation, used for logging purposes.
    ensureTrueCellMasks(short[]) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Initializes the static CombinationGeneratorTask.TRUE_CELL_ADJACENCY_MASKS and CombinationGeneratorTask.SUFFIX_OR_MASKS for a given puzzle.
    EVEN_NUM_COLS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    The number of columns in the even-indexed rows of the grid (rows 0, 2, 4, 6).
    Execution Model - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
     
    Execution Model - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
     
    EXPECTED_MASK - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    The target bitmask for a valid combination, where all bits corresponding to true cells are 1.

    F

    findAdjacents(short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Convenience overload for Grid.findAdjacents(short, ValueFormat) that assumes Grid.ValueFormat.Index for both input and output.
    findAdjacents(short, Grid.ValueFormat) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Convenience overload for Grid.findAdjacents(short, ValueFormat, ValueFormat) that assumes the input and output formats are the same.
    findAdjacents(short, Grid.ValueFormat, Grid.ValueFormat) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Finds the hexagonally adjacent cells for a given cell, supporting flexible input and output formats.
    findFirstTrueAdjacents() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Convenience overload for Grid.findFirstTrueAdjacents(ValueFormat) that assumes Grid.ValueFormat.Index for the output format.
    findFirstTrueAdjacents(Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Returns an array of adjacent cells to the first true cell in the requested format.
    findFirstTrueAdjacentsAfter(short, Grid.ValueFormat, Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Returns an array of adjacent cells to the first true cell that have an index greater than the specified cell.
    findFirstTrueCell() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Scans the grid and returns the first true cell in Index format.
    findFirstTrueCell(Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Scans the grid and returns the first true cell in the requested format.
    findTrueCells() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Scans the grid bitmask and returns an array of all true cells in Index format.
    findTrueCells(Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Scans the grid bitmask and returns an array of all true cells in the requested format.
    FIRST_TRUE_ADJACENTS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A bitmask representing the cells adjacent to the first initially true cell.
    firstTrueCell - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    A cached index of the first "on" (true) cell in the grid, in Grid.ValueFormat.Index format.
    flushAllPendingBatches() - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Flushes any remaining pending batches from a single thread's CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext to the CombinationQueueArray.
    flushBatchBlocking(WorkBatch) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Flushes a WorkBatch to the CombinationQueueArray, blocking if necessary until successful.
    flushBatchFast(WorkBatch) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Flushes a batch of combinations to an available queue, employing a backoff strategy if all queues are temporarily full.
    ForkJoinPool Behavior - Section in com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys.main(String[])
     
    format - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    The Grid.ValueFormat of the combination stored in CombinationMessage.list.
    formatElapsedTime(long) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
    Formats a millisecond duration into a human-readable "Elapsed time: Xh Ym Zs Wms" string.
    formatTo(StringBuilder) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Formats the combination as a human-readable string into the provided StringBuilder.

    G

    generationComplete - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    A volatile flag indicating that all producers have completed.
    generationComplete() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Marks the completion of the generators.
    GeneratorContext() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    Initializes a new CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext and registers it in the global context list.
    generatorPool - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The ForkJoinPool that executes the generator tasks.
    get() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    Retrieves an array from the pool.
    get() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    Retrieves a task from the pool.
    getAllQueues() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the entire array of work queues.
    getBit(int) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Checks the state of the bit at the specified index in the grid state.
    getCapacity() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    Returns the fixed capacity of the queue.
    getCapacity() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Returns the maximum number of combinations this batch can hold.
    getCombination(Grid.ValueFormat) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Returns the raw combination array, converting it to the specified format if necessary.
    getEndTime() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the end time of the program's operation, used for logging purposes.
    getForkJoinPool() - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Gets the ForkJoinPool used to execute generator tasks.
    getFormat() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Not used by this message type.
    getFormattedMessage() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Returns the formatted message as a String.
    getGridState() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Returns a copy of the current grid state as a long[2] bitmask.
    getInstance(int) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the singleton instance of CombinationQueueArray, initializing it with the specified number of consumers if it has not been created yet.
    getNewBatchBlocking() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    Retrieves a new WorkBatch from the global pool, spinning until one is available.
    getOrCreateBatch() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    Returns the current WorkBatch for this thread, obtaining a new one from the central pool if one doesn't exist.
    getParameters() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Not used by this message type.
    getQueue(int) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the work queue at the specified index.
    getStartTime() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the start time of the program's operation, used for logging purposes.
    getThreadName() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    Gets the name of the thread owning this context.
    getThrowable() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    Not used by this message type.
    getTrueCount() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Returns the count of true cells in the grid.
    getWinningCombination() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns a clone of the combination that solves the puzzle, or throws if no solution has been found yet.
    getWinningMonkey() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the name of the monkey that solved the puzzle, or throws if no solution has been found yet.
    getWork() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    Obtains a WorkBatch to process, using a work-stealing strategy.
    getWorkBatch() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    Retrieves a WorkBatch from the queue using a non-blocking, relaxed operation.
    getWorkBatchPool() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Returns the central pool for recycled WorkBatch objects.
    Grid - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A structure that represents the core hexagonal grid for a "Lights Out" style puzzle.
    Grid() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Constructs a new Grid instance and initializes it to a specific starting state.
    Grid.ValueFormat - Enum Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    Defines the different formats used to represent a cell's location on the grid.
    Grid13 - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A concrete Grid that provides the initial puzzle state for Q13 ("Kermit").
    Grid13() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid13
     
    Grid22 - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A concrete Grid that provides the initial puzzle state for Q22 ("Shrek").
    Grid22() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid22
     
    Grid35 - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A concrete Grid that provides the initial puzzle state for Q35 ("Buttercup").
    Grid35() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid35
     
    gridState - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    The state of the grid, represented as a 128-bit bitmask split across two long values.

    H

    head - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    The index of the next available array to be retrieved by ArrayPool.get().
    head - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    The index of the next task to be retrieved from the pool.
    head - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    The index of the next combination to be read from the circular WorkBatch.buffer.
    High-Performance Concurrency and Data Structures - Section in package com.github.mrgarbagegamer
     

    I

    Implementation Details - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
     
    Implementation Details - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
     
    Index - Enum constant in enum class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.ValueFormat
    A zero-based index from 0 to 108, representing a cell's position in the flattened grid.
    indexToPacked(short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Converts a cell from Grid.ValueFormat.Index to Grid.ValueFormat.PackedInt format.
    init(short[], int, long, boolean, boolean) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Initializes a recycled task with a new CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix and state.
    initClickAdjacencyMatrix() - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Initializes the static CombinationGeneratorTask.CLICK_ADJACENCY_MATRIX upon class loading.
    initialize() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Initializes the Grid instance to a specific starting state.
    initialize() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid13
    Loads the pre-computed state for the Q13 puzzle.
    initialize() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid22
    Loads the pre-computed state for the Q22 puzzle.
    initialize() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid35
    Loads the pre-computed state for the Q35 puzzle.
    initializeLookupTable(short[]) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    Initializes the static, shared lookup tables for the odd adjacency check.
    instance - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    The singleton instance of this class.
    isEmpty() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    Checks if the pool contains no available arrays.
    isEmpty() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    Checks if the queue is empty.
    isEmpty() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    Checks if the pool is empty.
    isEmpty() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Checks if the batch contains no combinations.
    isFull() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Checks if the batch has reached its maximum capacity.
    isGenerationComplete() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    An accessor for the CombinationQueueArray.generationComplete flag, giving external classes read access to the flag without direct exposure.
    isSolutionFound() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    An accessor for the CombinationQueueArray.solutionFound flag, giving external classes read access to the flag without direct exposure.
    isSolved() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Checks if the grid is completely solved (i.e., all cells are false).

    L

    Limitations and Future Improvements - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
     
    list - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
    The combination data.
    LOG_EVERY_N_FAILURES - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    A constant defining the frequency of logging for failed attempts.
    logger - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The logger for this class.
    logger - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
    The primary logger for the application, configured for high-performance, asynchronous logging.
    logger - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    The logger for this class.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
    The main entry point for the solver application.
    maxFirstClickIndex - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The maximum index allowed for the first click in any combination.

    N

    NUM_CELLS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    The total number of cells in the grid.
    NUM_ROWS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    The number of rows in the hexagonal grid.
    numClicks - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    The required size for all arrays managed by the pool.
    numClicks - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The target length of the combinations to be generated.
    numClicks - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    The number of clicks (elements) in each combination array.

    O

    ODD_NUM_COLS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    The number of columns in the odd-indexed rows of the grid (rows 1, 3, 5).

    P

    Package Architecture - Section in package com.github.mrgarbagegamer
     
    PACKED_TO_INDEX_CACHE - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    A pre-computed lookup table to accelerate conversion from Grid.ValueFormat.PackedInt to Grid.ValueFormat.Index.
    PackedInt - Enum constant in enum class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.ValueFormat
    A human-readable format where a cell's location is encoded as (row * 100 + col).
    packedToIndex(short) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Converts a cell from Grid.ValueFormat.PackedInt to Grid.ValueFormat.Index format using a pre-computed cache.

    poll() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Retrieves the next combination from the batch without allocating a new array.
    POOL_SIZE - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The pre-allocated size of the thread-local resource pools in CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.
    prefix - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The sequence of clicks made so far, forming the base for sub-tasks or final combinations.
    prefixArrayPool - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    A thread-local pool for recycling short[] arrays used for prefixes.
    prefixLength - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The current length of the CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix array.
    prefixParity - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A boolean indicating the parity of clicks affecting the first initially true cell in the CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix.
    printGrid() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Prints the current grid state to the logger in a human-readable format.
    put(short[]) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    Returns an array to the pool, making it available for reuse.
    put(CombinationGeneratorTask) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    Returns a task to the pool for recycling.
    Puzzle Details - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid13
     
    Puzzle Details - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid22
     
    Puzzle Details - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid35
     
    puzzleGrid - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    The monkey's dedicated Grid instance for testing combinations.

    Q

    queue - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    The underlying JCTools queue that holds WorkBatch objects.
    QUEUE_SIZE - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
    The fixed capacity of the queue.
    queueArray - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    The array of queues used to distribute WorkBatch objects to monkeys.
    queueArray - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    A reference to the shared CombinationQueueArray.
    queues - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    An array of work queues, with each queue dedicated to a specific monkey.

    R

    recalculationNeeded - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    A dirty flag indicating that the grid state has been modified and cached values are stale.
    recycleOwnResources(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Recycles the CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix and the CombinationGeneratorTask instance back to their respective pools within the provided CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.
    remainingCapacity - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Tracks the number of available slots in the batch.
    resetBatch() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    Replaces the CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.currentBatch with a new one obtained from the central pool.
    Resource Management - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
     
    Resource Management - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
     
    ROW_OFFSETS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Pre-computed offsets for the starting index of each row in the flattened grid.
    run() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    The main execution loop for the monkey thread.

    S

    satisfiesOddAdjacency(short[]) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    Checks if a combination is valid based on the "odd adjacency" rule.
    Scenarios Considered: - Section in com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.canAffectFirstTrueCell(short, short, Grid.ValueFormat)
     
    setBit(int) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    Sets the bit at the specified index in the grid state to true.
    setForkJoinPool(ForkJoinPool) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    Sets the ForkJoinPool used to execute generator tasks.
    setNumClicks(int) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    Sets the static size for all arrays that will be managed by ArrayPool instances.
    setNumClicks(int) - Static method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Sets the static number of clicks for all WorkBatch instances.
    size - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    The current number of arrays available in the pool.
    size - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    The current number of tasks available in the pool.
    size() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    Returns the number of arrays currently available in the pool.
    size() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    Returns the current number of available tasks in the pool.
    size() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Returns the number of combinations currently stored in the batch.
    skipConstraintsCheck - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A flag indicating that this task and all its descendants are guaranteed to satisfy the constraints, allowing future checks to be skipped.
    solutionFound - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    A volatile flag indicating that a solution has been found.
    solutionFound(String, short[]) - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    Signals that a solution has been found.
    startTime - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    The start time of the program's operation, used for logging purposes.
    StartYourMonkeys - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    The main application entry point and orchestrator for the Lights Out puzzle solver.
    StartYourMonkeys() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys
     
    Static Initialization - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
     
    SUFFIX_OR_MASKS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    An array of pre-computed "suffix OR" bitmasks for O(1) constraint checking.

    T

    tail - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
    The index where the next recycled array will be placed by ArrayPool.put(short[]).
    tail - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    The index where the next returned task will be placed.
    tail - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    The index of the next available slot for writing into the circular WorkBatch.buffer.
    targetMask - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    A bitmask where each bit corresponds to an initially true cell, and all bits are set to 1.
    taskPool - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    A thread-local pool for recycling CombinationGeneratorTask instances.
    TaskPool - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A non-thread-safe, high-performance object pool for recycling CombinationGeneratorTask instances.
    TaskPool(int) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
    Constructs a TaskPool with the specified capacity and pre-allocates tasks.
    TestClickCombination - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    An optimized worker thread that tests potential puzzle solutions from a shared work queue.
    TestClickCombination(String, CombinationQueue, CombinationQueueArray, Grid) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    Constructs a monkey thread.
    The helpQuiesce() Workaround - Section in com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.computeRootSubtasks(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext)
     
    threadName - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    The name of the thread owning this context, for logging purposes.
    Thread Safety - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage
     
    Thread Safety - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueue
     
    Thread Safety - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
     
    Thread Safety - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TaskPool
     
    Thread Safety - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
     
    triggerGeneratorShutdown() - Method in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.TestClickCombination
    Triggers an immediate shutdown of the generator ForkJoinPool.
    TRUE_CELL_ADJACENCY_MASKS - Static variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask
    An array of bitmasks where each mask represents which of the initially true cells a given click is adjacent to.
    trueCellsCount - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid
    A cached count of the number of "on" (true) cells in the grid.

    U

    Usage and Thread Safety - Section in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.ArrayPool
     

    V

    ValueFormat() - Constructor for enum class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.ValueFormat
     
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.ValueFormat
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.Grid.ValueFormat
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    winningCombination - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    The click combination that solves the puzzle.
    winningMonkey - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    The name of the monkey that found the solution.
    WorkBatch - Class in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    A high-performance, reusable container for batching puzzle combinations
    WorkBatch() - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Constructs a new WorkBatch with a pre-allocated internal buffer.
    WorkBatch(int) - Constructor for class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch
    Constructs a new WorkBatch with a pre-allocated internal buffer, using the inputted capacity.
    workBatchPool - Variable in class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationQueueArray
    A central, thread-safe pool for recycling WorkBatch objects.
    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P Q R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
